creator: vectadata@yahoo.com
text:
Attempting to compile py-gtk2 from ports results in the following errors:

gdk.c: In function 'pygdk_register_classes':
gdk.c:19148: error: 'GDK_TYPE_APP_LAUNCH_CONTEXT' undeclared (first use in this function)
gdk.c:19148: error: (Each undeclared identifier is reported only once
gdk.c:19148: error: for each function it appears in.)
gmake[2]: *** [_gtk_la-gdk.lo] Error 1
gmake[2]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/py-gtk2/work/pygtk-2.13.0/gtk'
gmake[1]: *** [all-recursive] Error 1
gmake[1]: Leaving directory `/usr/ports/x11-toolkits/py-gtk2/work/pygtk-2.13.0'
gmake: *** [all] Error 2
*** Error code 2

Stop in /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/py-gtk2.

Fix: 

unknown
How-To-Repeat: cd /usr/ports/x11-toolkits/py-gtk2
make build

*or* try to compile any program in ports that relies on py-gtk2.
